seo.title: Professional Postcard Mailing | Postalocity
seo.description: High-quality postcard printing and mailing services. Perfect for conference follow-ups, marketing campaigns, and direct mail. Get started today.
seo.ogDescription: Make your conference connections count. Professional postcard mailing with print and mail services.

hero.subhead: Follow up with your new contacts using professional, high-quality postcards. We handle printing, addressing, and mailing so you can focus on closing deals.

section.title: Why Use Professional Postcard Mailing?
section.description: Stand out from the crowd with high-quality printed postcards.

benefits.title: High Open Rate
benefits.detail: Unlike email, physical mail gets noticed. Postcards have a 90% open rate and create lasting impressions.

benefits.title: Saves Time
benefits.detail: No more stuffing envelopes or standing in line at the post office. We handle everything.

benefits.title: Professional Quality
benefits.detail: Premium cardstock, vibrant printing, and proper addressing make your brand look professional.

benefits.title: Address Verification
benefits.detail: We verify all addresses before printing to ensure your postcards actually get delivered.

section.title: Postcard Options
section.description: Choose the postcard size and options that fit your needs.

services.title: Standard 4x6
services.description: Perfect for short messages and quick follow-ups. Economical and effective.

services.title: Large 5x7
services.description: More space for your message and branding. Stands out in the mailbox.

services.title: Mailing Services
services.description: We handle printing, addressing, postage, and delivery. Just provide your design.

services.title: Targeted Lists
services.description: Need addresses? We can help you reach your ideal audience with targeted mailing lists.

faqs.a: We offer standard 4x6 and large 5x7 postcards. Both include standard bleed for professional printing.
Standard turnaround is 3-5 business days from approval to delivery. Rush options available.
We can connect you with design partners, or you can provide your own print-ready artwork.
No minimums! Send as few as 1 postcard or as many as 100,000+.

section.title: About Postalocity
section.description: Your partner in professional mailing services.

about.mission: Postalocity empowers businesses with professional, reliable automated printing and mailing services.
